channel.title: Messaging on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Messaging on Arrans github.io

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: berty/berty
item.description: Berty is a secure peer-to-peer messaging app that works with or without internet access, cellular data or trust in the network

item.title: processone/ejabberd
item.description: Robust, Ubiquitous and Massively Scalable Messaging Platform (XMPP, MQTT, SIP Server)

item.title: Sharkord/sharkord
item.description: Lightweight, self-hosted, open-source chat server with voice, video, text, and screen sharing. Built for small groups who want privacy, simplicity, and full control over their data.

item.title: tinode/chat
item.description: Instant messaging platform. Backend in Go. Clients: Swift iOS, Java Android, JS webapp, scriptable command line; chatbots

item.title: containrrr/shoutrrr
item.description: Notification library for gophers and their furry friends.
